src: This project is a merge of several common DateTime operations on the form of  extensions to System.DateTime, including natural date difference text (precise and human rounded), holidays and working days calculations on several culture locales.
ja: System.DateTimeの拡張として、自然言語による日付差分テキスト（精密・人間向け丸め）、複数カルチャーロケールの祝日・営業日計算など、よく使うDateTime操作をまとめたプロジェクト
